title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
As many had anticipated, the U.S.-Iran ceasefire has failed to hold, with renewed hostilities threatening to underminethe fragile optimism that the traffic in the Straits of Hormuz will be fully restored sooner than later. The latest developments have reinforced concerns that geopolitical risks remain elevated and continue to influence the decisions of Buyers and Sellers in all segments. On the commodity side, coal demand in the Far East is expected to strengthen, with Vietnam projected to reach record coal imports in 2026.
